const string net_sockets_useblocking = "Use the Blocking property to change the status of the Socket."

const string net_sockets_mustnotbebound = "The socket must not be bound or connected."
 
const string net_sockets_namedmustnotbebound = "{0}: The socket must not be bound or connected."
 
const string net_sockets_invalid_socketinformation = "The specified value for the socket information is invalid."

const string net_sockets_invalid_dnsendpoint = "The parameter {0} must not be of type DnsEndPoint."
 
const string net_sockets_disconnectedConnect = "Once the socket has been disconnected, you can only reconnect again asynchronously, and only to a different EndPoint. BeginConnect must be called on a thread that won't exit until the operation has been completed."

const string net_tcplistener_mustbestopped = "The TcpListener must not be listening before performing this operation."
 
const string net_sockets_no_duplicate_async = "BeginConnect cannot be called while another asynchronous operation is in progress on the same Socket."

const string InvalidAsyncResult = "The AsyncResult is not valid."
 
const string UnspecifiedHost = "The SMTP host was not specified."
 
const string InvalidPort = "The specified port is invalid. The port must be greater than 0."

const string ContentDispositionInvalid = "The specified content disposition is invalid."

const string Config_base_unrecognized_attribute = "Unrecognized attribute '{0}'. Note that attribute names are case-sensitive."

const string Config_invalid_type_attribute = "The '{0}' attribute must be set to a valid Type name."
 
const string Config_missing_required_attribute = "The '{0}' attribute must be specified on the '{1}' tag."
 
const string Config_name_value_file_section_file_invalid_root = "The root element must match the name of the section referencing the file, '{0}'"

const string Config_provider_not_found = "The provider was not found in the collection."
 
const string Config_property_name_cannot_be_empty = "Property '{0}' cannot be empty or null."
 
const string Config_section_cannot_clear_locked_section = "Cannot clear section handlers. Section '{0}' is locked."

const string Config_write_xml_returned_null = "WriteXml returned null."

const string Incorrect_base_type = "The specified type, '{0}' is not derived from the appropriate base type, '{1}'."
 
const string Only_specify_one = "'switchValue' and 'switchName' cannot both be specified on source '{0}'."

const string SettingsPropertyWrongType = "The settings property '{0}' is of a non-compatible type."
 
const string Type_isnt_tracelistener = "Could not add trace listener {0} because it is not a subclass of TraceListener."
 
const string Unable_to_convert_type_from_string = "Could not find a type-converter to convert object if type '{0}' from string."

const string Value_must_be_numeric = "Error in trace switch '{0}': The value of a switch must be integral."
 
const string Could_not_create_from_default_value = "The property '{0}' could not be created from it's default value. Error message: {1}"
 
const string Could_not_create_from_default_value_2 = "The property '{0}' could not be created from it's default value because the default value is of a different type."

const string FSW_IOError = "Error reading the {0} directory."
 
const string PatternInvalidChar = "The character '{0}' in the pattern provided is not valid."
 
const string BufferSizeTooLarge = "The specified buffer size is too large. FileSystemWatcher cannot allocate {0} bytes for the internal buffer."
 
const string FSW_ChangedFilter = "Flag to indicate which change event to monitor."
 
const string FSW_Enabled = "Flag to indicate whether this component is active or not."
 
const string FSW_Filter = "The file pattern filter."
 
const string FSW_IncludeSubdirectories = "Flag to watch subdirectories."
 
const string FSW_Path = "The path to the directory to monitor."
 
const string FSW_SynchronizingObject = "The object used to marshal the event handler calls issued as a result of a Directory change."
 
const string FSW_Changed = "Occurs when a file and/or directory change matches the filter."
 
const string FSW_Created = "Occurs when a file and/or directory creation matches the filter."
 
const string FSW_Deleted = "Occurs when a file and/or directory deletion matches the filter."
 
const string FSW_Renamed = "Occurs when a file and/or directory rename matches the filter."
 
const string FSW_BufferOverflow = "Too many changes at once in directory:{0}."
 
const string FileSystemWatcherDesc = "Monitors file system change notifications and raises events when a directory or file changes."
 
const string NotSet = "[Not Set]"
 
const string TimerAutoReset = "Indicates whether the timer will be restarted when it is enabled."
 
const string TimerEnabled = "Indicates whether the timer is enabled to fire events at a defined interval."
 
const string TimerInterval = "The number of milliseconds between timer events."
 
const string TimerIntervalElapsed = "Occurs when the Interval has elapsed."
 
const string TimerSynchronizingObject = "The object used to marshal the event handler calls issued when an interval has elapsed."
 
const string MismatchedCounterTypes = "Mismatched counter types."
 
const string NoPropertyForAttribute = "Could not find a property for the attribute '{0}'."
 
const string InvalidAttributeType = "The value of attribute '{0}' could not be converted to the proper type."
 
const string Generic_ArgCantBeEmptyString = "'{0}' can not be empty string."
 
const string BadLogName = "Event log names must consist of printable characters and cannot contain \\, *, ?, or spaces"
 
const string InvalidProperty = "Invalid value {1} for property {0}."
 
const string CantMonitorEventLog = "Cannot monitor EntryWritten events for this EventLog. This might be because the EventLog is on a remote machine which is not a supported scenario."
 
const string InitTwice = "Cannot initialize the same object twice."
 
const string InvalidParameter = "Invalid value '{1}' for parameter '{0}'."
 
const string MissingParameter = "Must specify value for {0}."
 
const string ParameterTooLong = "The size of {0} is too big. It cannot be longer than {1} characters."
 
const string LocalSourceAlreadyExists = "Source {0} already exists on the local computer."
 
const string SourceAlreadyExists = "Source {0} already exists on the computer '{1}'."
 
const string LocalLogAlreadyExistsAsSource = "Log {0} has already been registered as a source on the local computer."
 
const string LogAlreadyExistsAsSource = "Log {0} has already been registered as a source on the computer '{1}'."
 
const string DuplicateLogName = "Only the first eight characters of a custom log name are significant, and there is already another log on the system using the first eight characters of the name given. Name given: '{0}', name of existing log: '{1}'."
 
const string RegKeyMissing = "Cannot open registry key {0}\\{1}\\{2} on computer '{3}'."
 
const string LocalRegKeyMissing = "Cannot open registry key {0}\\{1}\\{2}."
 
const string RegKeyMissingShort = "Cannot open registry key {0} on computer {1}."
 
const string InvalidParameterFormat = "Invalid format for argument {0}."
 
const string NoLogName = "Log to delete was not specified."
 
const string RegKeyNoAccess = "Cannot open registry key {0} on computer {1}. You might not have access."
 
const string MissingLog = "Cannot find Log {0} on computer '{1}'."
 
const string SourceNotRegistered = "The source '{0}' is not registered on machine '{1}', or you do not have write access to the {2} registry key."
 
const string LocalSourceNotRegistered = "Source {0} is not registered on the local computer."
 
const string CantRetrieveEntries = "Cannot retrieve all entries."
 
const string IndexOutOfBounds = "Index {0} is out of bounds."
 
const string CantReadLogEntryAt = "Cannot read log entry number {0}. The event log may be corrupt."
 
const string MissingLogProperty = "Log property value has not been specified."
 
const string CantOpenLog = "Cannot open log {0} on machine {1}. Windows has not provided an error code."
 
const string NeedSourceToOpen = "Source property was not set before opening the event log in write mode."
 
const string NeedSourceToWrite = "Source property was not set before writing to the event log."
 
const string CantOpenLogAccess = "Cannot open log for source '{0}'. You may not have write access."
 
const string LogEntryTooLong = "Log entry string is too long. A string written to the event log cannot exceed 32766 characters."
 
const string TooManyReplacementStrings = "The maximum allowed number of replacement strings is 255."
 
const string LogSourceMismatch = "The source '{0}' is not registered in log '{1}'. (It is registered in log '{2}'.) \" The Source and Log properties must be matched, or you may set Log to the empty string, and it will automatically be matched to the Source property."
 
const string NoAccountInfo = "Cannot obtain account information."
 
const string NoCurrentEntry = "No current EventLog entry available, cursor is located before the first or after the last element of the enumeration."
 
const string MessageNotFormatted = "The description for Event ID '{0}' in Source '{1}' cannot be found. The local computer may not have the necessary registry information or message DLL files to display the message, or you may not have permission to access them. The following information is part of the event:"
 
const string EventID = "Invalid eventID value '{0}'. It must be in the range between '{1}' and '{2}'."
 
const string LogDoesNotExists = "The event log '{0}' on computer '{1}' does not exist."
 
const string InvalidCustomerLogName = "The log name: '{0}' is invalid for customer log creation."
 
const string CannotDeleteEqualSource = "The event log source '{0}' cannot be deleted, because it's equal to the log name."
 
const string RentionDaysOutOfRange = "'retentionDays' must be between 1 and 365 days."
 
const string MaximumKilobytesOutOfRange = "MaximumKilobytes must be between 64 KB and 4 GB, and must be in 64K increments."
 
const string SomeLogsInaccessible = "The source was not found, but some or all event logs could not be searched. Inaccessible logs: {0}."
 
const string SomeLogsInaccessibleToCreate = "The source was not found, but some or all event logs could not be searched. To create the source, you need permission to read all event logs to make sure that the new source name is unique. Inaccessible logs: {0}."
 
const string BadConfigSwitchValue = "The config value for Switch '{0}' was invalid."
 
const string ConfigSectionsUnique = "The '{0}' section can only appear once per config file."
 
const string ConfigSectionsUniquePerSection = "The '{0}' tag can only appear once per section."
 
const string SourceListenerDoesntExist = "The listener '{0}' added to source '{1}' must have a listener with the same name defined in the main Trace listeners section."
 
const string SourceSwitchDoesntExist = "The source '{0}' must have a switch with the same name defined in the Switches section."
 
const string CategoryHelpCorrupt = "Cannot load Category Help data because an invalid index '{0}' was read from the registry."
 
const string CounterNameCorrupt = "Cannot load Counter Name data because an invalid index '{0}' was read from the registry."
 
const string CounterDataCorrupt = "Cannot load Performance Counter data because an unexpected registry key value type was read from '{0}'."
 
const string ReadOnlyCounter = "Cannot update Performance Counter, this object has been initialized as ReadOnly."
 
const string ReadOnlyRemoveInstance = "Cannot remove Performance Counter Instance, this object as been initialized as ReadOnly."
 
const string NotCustomCounter = "The requested Performance Counter is not a custom counter, it has to be initialized as ReadOnly."
 
const string CategoryNameMissing = "Failed to initialize because CategoryName is missing."
 
const string CounterNameMissing = "Failed to initialize because CounterName is missing."
 
const string InstanceNameProhibited = "Counter is single instance, instance name '{0}' is not valid for this counter category."
 
const string InstanceNameRequired = "Counter is not single instance, an instance name needs to be specified."
 
const string MissingInstance = "Instance {0} does not exist in category {1}."
 
const string PerformanceCategoryExists = "Cannot create Performance Category '{0}' because it already exists."
 
const string InvalidCounterName = "Invalid empty or null string for counter name."
 
const string DuplicateCounterName = "Cannot create Performance Category with counter name {0} because the name is a duplicate."
 
const string CantChangeCategoryRegistration = "Cannot create or delete the Performance Category '{0}' because access is denied."
 
const string CantDeleteCategory = "Cannot delete Performance Category because this category is not registered or is a system category."
 
const string MissingCategory = "Category does not exist."
 
const string MissingCategoryDetail = "Category {0} does not exist."
 
const string CantReadCategory = "Cannot read Category {0}."
 
const string MissingCounter = "Counter {0} does not exist."
 
const string CategoryNameNotSet = "Category name property has not been set."
 
const string CounterExists = "Could not locate Performance Counter with specified category name '{0}', counter name '{1}'."
 
const string CantReadCategoryIndex = "Could not Read Category Index: {0}."
 
const string CantReadCounter = "Counter '{0}' does not exist in the specified Category."
 
const string CantReadInstance = "Instance '{0}' does not exist in the specified Category."
 
const string RemoteWriting = "Cannot write to a Performance Counter in a remote machine."
 
const string CounterLayout = "The Counter layout for the Category specified is invalid, a counter of the type: AverageCount64, AverageTimer32, CounterMultiTimer, CounterMultiTimerInverse, CounterMultiTimer100Ns, CounterMultiTimer100NsInverse, RawFraction, or SampleFraction has to be immediately followed by any of the base counter types: AverageBase, CounterMultiBase, RawBase or SampleBase."
 
const string PossibleDeadlock = "The operation couldn't be completed, potential internal deadlock."
 
const string SharedMemoryGhosted = "Cannot access shared memory, AppDomain has been unloaded."
 
const string HelpNotAvailable = "Help not available."
 
const string PerfInvalidHelp = "Invalid help string. Its length must be in the range between '{0}' and '{1}'."
 
const string PerfInvalidCounterName = "Invalid counter name. Its length must be in the range between '{0}' and '{1}'. Double quotes, control characters and leading or trailing spaces are not allowed."
 
const string PerfInvalidCategoryName = "Invalid category name. Its length must be in the range between '{0}' and '{1}'. Double quotes, control characters and leading or trailing spaces are not allowed."
 
const string MustAddCounterCreationData = "Only objects of type CounterCreationData can be added to a CounterCreationDataCollection."
 
const string RemoteCounterAdmin = "Creating or Deleting Performance Counter Categories on remote machines is not supported."
 
const string NoInstanceInformation = "The {0} category doesn't provide any instance information, no accurate data can be returned."
 
const string PerfCounterPdhError = "There was an error calculating the PerformanceCounter value (0x{0})."
 
const string MultiInstanceOnly = "Category '{0}' is marked as multi-instance. Performance counters in this category can only be created with instance names."
 
const string SingleInstanceOnly = "Category '{0}' is marked as single-instance. Performance counters in this category can only be created without instance names."
 
const string InstanceNameTooLong = "Instance names used for writing to custom counters must be 127 characters or less."
 
const string CategoryNameTooLong = "Category names must be 1024 characters or less."
 
const string InstanceLifetimeProcessonReadOnly = "InstanceLifetime is unused by ReadOnly counters."
 
const string InstanceLifetimeProcessforSingleInstance = "Single instance categories are only valid with the Global lifetime."
 
const string InstanceAlreadyExists = "Instance '{0}' already exists with a lifetime of Process. It cannot be recreated or reused until it has been removed or until the process using it has exited."
 
const string CantSetLifetimeAfterInitialized = "The InstanceLifetime cannot be set after the instance has been initialized. You must use the default constructor and set the CategoryName, InstanceName, CounterName, InstanceLifetime and ReadOnly properties manually before setting the RawValue."
 
const string ProcessLifetimeNotValidInGlobal = "PerformanceCounterInstanceLifetime.Process is not valid in the global shared memory. If your performance counter category was created with an older version of the Framework, it uses the global shared memory. Either use PerformanceCounterInstanceLifetime.Global, or if applications running on older versions of the Framework do not need to write to your category, delete and recreate it."
 
const string CantConvertProcessToGlobal = "An instance with a lifetime of Process can only be accessed from a PerformanceCounter with the InstanceLifetime set to PerformanceCounterInstanceLifetime.Process."
 
const string CantConvertGlobalToProcess = "An instance with a lifetime of Global can only be accessed from a PerformanceCounter with the InstanceLifetime set to PerformanceCounterInstanceLifetime.Global."
 
const string PCNotSupportedUnderAppContainer = "Writeable performance counters are not allowed when running in AppContainer."
 
const string PriorityClassNotSupported = "The AboveNormal and BelowNormal priority classes are not available on this platform."
 
const string WinNTRequired = "Feature requires Windows NT."
 
const string Win2kRequired = "Feature requires Windows 2000."
 
const string NoAssociatedProcess = "No process is associated with this object."
 
const string ProcessIdRequired = "Feature requires a process identifier."
 
const string NotSupportedRemote = "Feature is not supported for remote machines."
 
const string NoProcessInfo = "Process has exited, so the requested information is not available."
 
const string WaitTillExit = "Process must exit before requested information can be determined."
 
const string NoProcessHandle = "Process was not started by this object, so requested information cannot be determined."
 
const string MissingProccess = "Process with an Id of {0} is not running."
 
const string BadMinWorkset = "Minimum working set size is invalid. It must be less than or equal to the maximum working set size."
 
const string BadMaxWorkset = "Maximum working set size is invalid. It must be greater than or equal to the minimum working set size."
 
const string WinNTRequiredForRemote = "Operating system does not support accessing processes on remote computers. This feature requires Windows NT or later."
 
const string ProcessHasExited = "Cannot process request because the process ({0}) has exited."
 
const string ProcessHasExitedNoId = "Cannot process request because the process has exited."
 
const string ThreadExited = "The request cannot be processed because the thread ({0}) has exited."
 
const string Win2000Required = "Feature requires Windows 2000 or later."
 
const string ProcessNotFound = "Thread {0} found, but no process {1} found."
 
const string CantGetProcessId = "Cannot retrieve process identifier from the process handle."
 
const string ProcessDisabled = "Process performance counter is disabled, so the requested operation cannot be performed."
 
const string WaitReasonUnavailable = "WaitReason is only available if the ThreadState is Wait."
 
const string NotSupportedRemoteThread = "Feature is not supported for threads on remote computers."
 
const string UseShellExecuteRequiresSTA = "Current thread is not in Single Thread Apartment (STA) mode. Starting a process with UseShellExecute set to True requires the current thread be in STA mode. Ensure that your Main function has STAThreadAttribute marked."
 
const string CantRedirectStreams = "The Process object must have the UseShellExecute property set to false in order to redirect IO streams."
 
const string CantUseEnvVars = "The Process object must have the UseShellExecute property set to false in order to use environment variables."
 
const string CantStartAsUser = "The Process object must have the UseShellExecute property set to false in order to start a process as a user."
 
const string CouldntConnectToRemoteMachine = "Couldn't connect to remote machine."
 
const string CouldntGetProcessInfos = "Couldn't get process information from performance counter."
 
const string InputIdleUnkownError = "WaitForInputIdle failed. This could be because the process does not have a graphical interface."
 
const string FileNameMissing = "Cannot start process because a file name has not been provided."
 
const string EnvironmentBlock = "The environment block provided doesn't have the correct format."
 
const string EnumProcessModuleFailed = "Unable to enumerate the process modules."
 
const string EnumProcessModuleFailedDueToWow = "A 32 bit processes cannot access modules of a 64 bit process."
 
const string PendingAsyncOperation = "An async read operation has already been started on the stream."
 
const string NoAsyncOperation = "No async read operation is in progress on the stream."
 
const string InvalidApplication = "The specified executable is not a valid application for this OS platform."
 
const string StandardOutputEncodingNotAllowed = "StandardOutputEncoding is only supported when standard output is redirected."
 
const string StandardErrorEncodingNotAllowed = "StandardErrorEncoding is only supported when standard error is redirected."
 
const string CountersOOM = "Custom counters file view is out of memory."
 
const string MappingCorrupted = "Cannot continue the current operation, the performance counters memory mapping has been corrupted."
 
const string SetSecurityDescriptorFailed = "Cannot initialize security descriptor initialized."
 
const string CantCreateFileMapping = "Cannot create file mapping."
 
const string CantMapFileView = "Cannot map view of file."
 
const string CantGetMappingSize = "Cannot calculate the size of the file view."
 
const string CantGetStandardOut = "StandardOut has not been redirected or the process hasn't started yet."
 
const string CantGetStandardIn = "StandardIn has not been redirected."
 
const string CantGetStandardError = "StandardError has not been redirected."
 
const string CantMixSyncAsyncOperation = "Cannot mix synchronous and asynchronous operation on process stream."
 
const string NoFileMappingSize = "Cannot retrieve file mapping size while initializing configuration settings."
 
const string EnvironmentBlockTooLong = "The environment block used to start a process cannot be longer than 65535 bytes. Your environment block is {0} bytes long. Remove some environment variables and try again."
 
const string Arg_SecurityException = "The port name cannot start with '\\'."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Array = "Array cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Buffer = "Buffer cannot be null."
 
const string IO_UnknownError = "Unknown Error '{0}'."
 
const string NotSupported_UnwritableStream = "Stream does not support writing."
 
const string ObjectDisposed_WriterClosed = "Can not write to a closed TextWriter."
 
const string NotSupportedOS = "GetPortNames is not supported on Win9x platforms."
 
const string BaudRate = "The baud rate to use on this serial port."
 
const string DataBits = "The number of data bits per transmitted/received byte."
 
const string DiscardNull = "Whether to discard null bytes received on the port before adding to serial buffer."
 
const string DtrEnable = "Whether to enable the Data Terminal Ready (DTR) line during communications."
 
const string EncodingMonitoringDescription = "The encoding to use when reading and writing strings."
 
const string Handshake = "The handshaking protocol for flow control in data exchange, which can be None."
 
const string NewLine = "The string used by ReadLine and WriteLine to denote a new line."
 
const string Parity = "The scheme for parity checking each received byte and marking each transmitted byte."
 
const string ParityReplace = "Byte with which to replace bytes received with parity errors."
 
const string PortName = "The name of the communications port to open."
 
const string ReadBufferSize = "The size of the read buffer in bytes. This is the maximum number of read bytes which can be buffered."
 
const string ReadTimeout = "The read timeout in Milliseconds."
 
const string ReceivedBytesThreshold = "Number of bytes required to be available before the Read event is fired."
 
const string RtsEnable = "Whether to enable the Request To Send (RTS) line during communications."
 
const string SerialPortDesc = "Represents a serial port resource."
 
const string StopBits = "The number of stop bits per transmitted/received byte."
 
const string WriteBufferSize = "The size of the write buffer in bytes. This is the maximum number of bytes which can be queued for write."
 
const string WriteTimeout = "The write timeout in milliseconds."
 
const string SerialErrorReceived = "Raised each time when an error is received from the SerialPort."
 
const string SerialPinChanged = "Raised each time when pin is changed on the SerialPort."
 
const string SerialDataReceived = "Raised each time when data is received from the SerialPort."
 
const string CounterType = "The type of this counter."
 
const string CounterName = "The name of this counter."
 
const string CounterHelp = "Help information for this counter."
 
const string EventLogDesc = "Provides interaction with Windows event logs."
 
const string ErrorDataReceived = "User event handler to call for async IO with StandardError stream."
 
const string LogEntries = "The contents of the log."
 
const string LogLog = "Gets or sets the name of the log to read from and write to."
 
const string LogMachineName = "The name of the machine on which to read or write events."
 
const string LogMonitoring = "Indicates if the component monitors the event log for changes."
 
const string LogSynchronizingObject = "The object used to marshal the event handler calls issued as a result of an EventLog change."
 
const string LogSource = "The application name (source name) to use when writing to the event log."
 
const string LogEntryWritten = "Raised each time any application writes an entry to the event log."
 
const string LogEntryMachineName = "The machine on which this event log resides."
 
const string LogEntryData = "The binary data associated with this entry in the event log."
 
const string LogEntryIndex = "The sequence of this entry in the event log."
 
const string LogEntryCategory = "The category for this message."
 
const string LogEntryCategoryNumber = "An application-specific category number assigned to this entry."
 
const string LogEntryEventID = "The number identifying the message for this source."
 
const string LogEntryEntryType = "The type of entry - Information, Warning, etc."
 
const string LogEntryMessage = "The text of the message for this entry"
 
const string LogEntrySource = "The name of the application that wrote this entry."
 
const string LogEntryReplacementStrings = "The application-supplied strings used in the message."
 
const string LogEntryResourceId = "The full number identifying the message in the event message dll."
 
const string LogEntryTimeGenerated = "The time at which the application logged this entry."
 
const string LogEntryTimeWritten = "The time at which the system logged this entry to the event log."
 
const string LogEntryUserName = "The username of the account associated with this entry by the writing application."
 
const string OutputDataReceived = "User event handler to call for async IO with StandardOutput stream."
 
const string PC_CounterHelp = "The description message for this counter."
 
const string PC_CounterType = "The counter type indicates how to interpret the value of the counter, for example an actual count or a rate of change."
 
const string PC_ReadOnly = "Indicates if the counter is read only. Remote counters and counters not created using this component are read-only."
 
const string PC_RawValue = "Directly accesses the raw value of this counter. The counter must have been created using this component."
 
const string ProcessAssociated = "Indicates if the process component is associated with a real process."
 
const string ProcessDesc = "Provides access to local and remote processes, enabling starting and stopping of local processes."
 
const string ProcessExitCode = "The value returned from the associated process when it terminated."
 
const string ProcessTerminated = "Indicates if the associated process has been terminated."
 
const string ProcessExitTime = "The time that the associated process exited."
 
const string ProcessHandle = "Returns the native handle for this process. The handle is only available if the process was started using this component."
 
const string ProcessHandleCount = "The number of native handles associated with this process."
 
const string ProcessId = "The unique identifier for the process."
 
const string ProcessMachineName = "The name of the machine the running the process."
 
const string ProcessMainModule = "The main module for the associated process."
 
const string ProcessModules = "The modules that have been loaded by the associated process."
 
const string ProcessSynchronizingObject = "The object used to marshal the event handler calls issued as a result of a Process exit."
 
const string ProcessSessionId = "The identifier for the session of the process."
 
const string ProcessThreads = "The threads running in the associated process."
 
const string ProcessEnableRaisingEvents = "Whether the process component should watch for the associated process to exit, and raise the Exited event."
 
const string ProcessExited = "If the WatchForExit property is set to true, then this event is raised when the associated process exits."
 
const string ProcessFileName = "The name of the application, document or URL to start."
 
const string ProcessWorkingDirectory = "The initial working directory for the process."
 
const string ProcessBasePriority = "The base priority computed based on the priority class that all threads run relative to."
 
const string ProcessMainWindowHandle = "The handle of the main window for the process."
 
const string ProcessMainWindowTitle = "The caption of the main window for the process."
 
const string ProcessMaxWorkingSet = "The maximum amount of physical memory the process has required since it was started."
 
const string ProcessMinWorkingSet = "The minimum amount of physical memory the process has required since it was started."
 
const string ProcessNonpagedSystemMemorySize = "The number of bytes of non pageable system memory the process is using."
 
const string ProcessPagedMemorySize = "The current amount of memory that can be paged to disk that the process is using."
 
const string ProcessPagedSystemMemorySize = "The number of bytes of pageable system memory the process is using."
 
const string ProcessPeakPagedMemorySize = "The maximum amount of memory that can be paged to disk that the process has used since it was started."
 
const string ProcessPeakWorkingSet = "The maximum amount of physical memory the process has used since it was started."
 
const string ProcessPeakVirtualMemorySize = "The maximum amount of virtual memory the process has allocated since it was started."
 
const string ProcessPriorityBoostEnabled = "Whether this process would like a priority boost when the user interacts with it."
 
const string ProcessPriorityClass = "The priority that the threads in the process run relative to."
 
const string ProcessPrivateMemorySize = "The current amount of memory that the process has allocated that cannot be shared with other processes."
 
const string ProcessPrivilegedProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the process spent inside the operating system core."
 
const string ProcessProcessName = "The name of the process."
 
const string ProcessProcessorAffinity = "A bit mask which represents the processors that the threads within the process are allowed to run on."
 
const string ProcessResponding = "Whether this process is currently responding."
 
const string ProcessStandardError = "Standard error stream of the process."
 
const string ProcessStandardInput = "Standard input stream of the process."
 
const string ProcessStandardOutput = "Standard output stream of the process."
 
const string ProcessStartInfo = "Specifies information used to start a process."
 
const string ProcessStartTime = "The time at which the process was started."
 
const string ProcessTotalProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the process has used."
 
const string ProcessUserProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the process spent outside the operating system core."
 
const string ProcessVirtualMemorySize = "The amount of virtual memory the process has currently allocated."
 
const string ProcessWorkingSet = "The current amount of physical memory the process is using."
 
const string ProcModModuleName = "The name of the module."
 
const string ProcModFileName = "The file name of the module."
 
const string ProcModBaseAddress = "The memory address that the module loaded at."
 
const string ProcModModuleMemorySize = "The amount of virtual memory required by the code and data in the module file."
 
const string ProcModEntryPointAddress = "The memory address of the function that runs when the module is loaded."
 
const string ProcessVerb = "The verb to apply to the document specified by the FileName property."
 
const string ProcessArguments = "Command line arguments that will be passed to the application specified by the FileName property."
 
const string ProcessErrorDialog = "Whether to show an error dialog to the user if there is an error."
 
const string ProcessWindowStyle = "How the main window should be created when the process starts."
 
const string ProcessCreateNoWindow = "Whether to start the process without creating a new window to contain it."
 
const string ProcessEnvironmentVariables = "Set of environment variables that apply to this process and child processes."
 
const string ProcessRedirectStandardInput = "Whether the process command input is read from the Process instance's StandardInput member."
 
const string ProcessRedirectStandardOutput = "Whether the process output is written to the Process instance's StandardOutput member."
 
const string ProcessRedirectStandardError = "Whether the process's error output is written to the Process instance's StandardError member."
 
const string ProcessUseShellExecute = "Whether to use the operating system shell to start the process."
 
const string ThreadBasePriority = "The current base priority of the thread."
 
const string ThreadCurrentPriority = "The current priority level of the thread."
 
const string ThreadId = "The unique identifier for the thread."
 
const string ThreadPriorityBoostEnabled = "Whether the thread would like a priority boost when the user interacts with UI associated with the thread."
 
const string ThreadPriorityLevel = "The priority level of the thread."
 
const string ThreadPrivilegedProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the thread spent inside the operating system core."
 
const string ThreadStartAddress = "The memory address of the function that was run when the thread started."
 
const string ThreadStartTime = "The time the thread was started."
 
const string ThreadThreadState = "The execution state of the thread."
 
const string ThreadTotalProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the thread has consumed since it was started."
 
const string ThreadUserProcessorTime = "The amount of CPU time the thread spent outside the operating system core."
 
const string ThreadWaitReason = "The reason the thread is waiting, if it is waiting."

const string ConcurrentDictionary_SourceContainsDuplicateKeys = "The source argument contains duplicate keys."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_ConcurrencyLevelMustBePositive = "The concurrencyLevel argument must be positive."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_CapacityMustNotBeNegative = "The capacity argument must be greater than or equal to zero."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_IndexIsNegative = "The index argument is less than zero."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_ArrayNotLargeEnough = "The index is equal to or greater than the length of the array, or the number of elements in the dictionary is greater than the available space from index to the end of the destination array."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_KeyAlreadyExisted = "The key already existed in the dictionary."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_ItemKeyIsNull = "TKey is a reference type and item.Key is null."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_TypeOfKeyIncorrect = "The key was of an incorrect type for this dictionary."
 
const string ConcurrentDictionary_TypeOfValueIncorrect = "The value was of an incorrect type for this dictionary."
 
const string ConcurrentStack_PushPopRange_CountOutOfRange = "The count argument must be greater than or equal to zero."
 
const string ConcurrentStack_PushPopRange_InvalidCount = "The sum of the startIndex and count arguments must be less than or equal to the collection's Count."
 
const string ConcurrentStack_PushPopRange_StartOutOfRange = "The startIndex argument must be greater than or equal to zero."
 
const string Partitioner_DynamicPartitionsNotSupported = "Dynamic partitions are not supported by this partitioner."
 
const string PartitionerStatic_CanNotCallGetEnumeratorAfterSourceHasBeenDisposed = "Can not call GetEnumerator on partitions after the source enumerable is disposed"
 
const string PartitionerStatic_CurrentCalledBeforeMoveNext = "MoveNext must be called at least once before calling Current."
 
const string ConcurrentBag_Enumerator_EnumerationNotStartedOrAlreadyFinished = "Enumeration has either not started or has already finished."

const string Argument_ImplementIComparable = "At least one object must implement IComparable."
 
const string Arg_RemoveArgNotFound = "Cannot remove the specified item because it was not found in the specified Collection."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Dictionary = "Dictionary cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_QueueGrowFactor = "Queue grow factor must be between {0} and {1}."

const string none = "(none)"
 
const string Null = "(null)"
 
const string Text = "(Text)"
 
const string InvalidColor = "Color '{0}' is not valid."
 
const string TextParseFailedFormat = "Text \"{0}\" cannot be parsed. The expected text format is \"{1}\"."
 
const string PropertyValueInvalidEntry = "IDictionary parameter contains at least one entry that is not valid. Ensure all values are consistent with the object's properties."
 
const string ArgumentException_BufferNotFromPool = "The buffer is not associated with this pool and may not be returned to it."
 
const string Arg_FileIsDirectory_Name = "The target file '{0}' is a directory, not a file."
 
const string Arg_HandleNotAsync = "Handle does not support asynchronous operations. The parameters to the FileStream constructor may need to be changed to indicate that the handle was opened synchronously (that is, it was not opened for overlapped I/O)."
 
const string Arg_HandleNotSync = "Handle does not support synchronous operations. The parameters to the FileStream constructor may need to be changed to indicate that the handle was opened asynchronously (that is, it was opened explicitly for overlapped I/O)."
 
const string Arg_InvalidFileAttrs = "Invalid File or Directory attributes value."
 
const string Arg_InvalidHandle = "Invalid handle."
 
const string Arg_InvalidSearchPattern = "Search pattern cannot contain '..' to move up directories and can be contained only internally in file/directory names, as in 'a..b'."
 
const string Arg_Path2IsRooted = "Second path fragment must not be a drive or UNC name."
 
const string Arg_PathIsVolume = "Path must not be a drive."
 
const string ArgumentNull_FileName = "File name cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Path = "Path cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Enum = "Enum value was out of legal range."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_FileLengthTooBig = "Specified file length was too large for the file system."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NeedPosNum = "Positive number required."
 
const string Argument_EmptyFileName = "Empty file name is not legal."
 
const string Argument_EmptyPath = "Empty path name is not legal."
 
const string Argument_FileNotResized = "The stream's length cannot be changed."
 
const string Argument_InvalidAppendMode = "Append access can be requested only in write-only mode."
 
const string Argument_InvalidFileModeAndAccessCombo = "Combining FileMode: {0} with FileAccess: {1} is invalid."
 
const string Argument_InvalidPathChars = "Illegal characters in path '{0}'."
 
const string Argument_InvalidSeekOrigin = "Invalid seek origin."
 
const string Argument_InvalidSubPath = "The directory specified, '{0}', is not a subdirectory of '{1}'."
 
const string Argument_PathEmpty = "Path cannot be the empty string or all whitespace."
 
const string IO_AlreadyExists_Name = "Cannot create '{0}' because a file or directory with the same name already exists."
 
const string IO_BindHandleFailed = "BindHandle for ThreadPool failed on this handle."
 
const string IO_CannotCreateDirectory = "The specified directory '{0}' cannot be created."
 
const string IO_EOF_ReadBeyondEOF = "Unable to read beyond the end of the stream."
 
const string IO_FileCreateAlreadyExists = "Cannot create a file when that file already exists."
 
const string IO_FileExists_Name = "The file '{0}' already exists."
 
const string IO_FileNotFound = "Unable to find the specified file."
 
const string IO_FileNotFound_FileName = "Could not find file '{0}'."
 
const string IO_FileStreamHandlePosition = "The OS handle's position is not what FileStream expected. Do not use a handle simultaneously in one FileStream and in Win32 code or another FileStream. This may cause data loss."
 
const string IO_FileTooLong2GB = "The file is too long. This operation is currently limited to supporting files less than 2 gigabytes in size."
 
const string IO_FileTooLongOrHandleNotSync = "IO operation will not work. Most likely the file will become too long or the handle was not opened to support synchronous IO operations."
 
const string IO_PathNotFound_NoPathName = "Could not find a part of the path."
 
const string IO_PathNotFound_Path = "Could not find a part of the path '{0}'."
 
const string IO_PathTooLong = "The specified file name or path is too long, or a component of the specified path is too long."
 
const string IO_SeekAppendOverwrite = "Unable seek backward to overwrite data that previously existed in a file opened in Append mode."
 
const string IO_SetLengthAppendTruncate = "Unable to truncate data that previously existed in a file opened in Append mode."
 
const string IO_SharingViolation_File = "The process cannot access the file '{0}' because it is being used by another process."

const string IO_SourceDestMustBeDifferent = "Source and destination path must be different."
 
const string IO_SourceDestMustHaveSameRoot = "Source and destination path must have identical roots. Move will not work across volumes."
 
const string IO_SyncOpOnUIThread = "Synchronous operations should not be performed on the UI thread. Consider wrapping this method in Task.Run."
 
const string IO_UnknownFileName = "[Unknown]"
 
const string IndexOutOfRange_IORaceCondition = "Probable I/O race condition detected while copying memory. The I/O package is not thread safe by default. In multithreaded applications, a stream must be accessed in a thread-safe way, such as a thread-safe wrapper returned by TextReader's or TextWriter's Synchronized methods. This also applies to classes like StreamWriter and StreamReader."
 
const string NotSupported_UnseekableStream = "Stream does not support seeking."
 
const string ObjectDisposed_FileClosed = "Cannot access a closed file."
 
const string UnauthorizedAccess_IODenied_NoPathName = "Access to the path is denied."

const string ObjectDisposed_StreamClosed = "Cannot access a closed Stream."
 
const string PlatformNotSupported_FileEncryption = "File encryption is not supported on this platform."
 
const string IO_PathTooLong_Path = "The path '{0}' is too long, or a component of the specified path is too long."
 
const string InvalidDirName_NotExists = "The directory name '{0}' does not exist."

const string net_WebSockets_ArgumentOutOfRange_TooBig = "The value of the '{0}' parameter ({1}) must be less than or equal to {2}."

const string net_Websockets_AlreadyOneOutstandingOperation = "There is already one outstanding '{0}' call for this WebSocket instance. ReceiveAsync and SendAsync can be called simultaneously, but at most one outstanding operation for each of them is allowed at the same time."
 
const string net_WebSockets_InvalidMessageType = "The received message type '{2}' is invalid after calling {0}. {0} should only be used if no more data is expected from the remote endpoint. Use '{1}' instead to keep being able to receive data but close the output channel."

const string net_WebSockets_Argument_InvalidMessageType = "The message type '{0}' is not allowed for the '{1}' operation. Valid message types are: '{2}, {3}'. To close the WebSocket, use the '{4}' operation instead. "

const string net_ftpstatuscode_ActionAbortedUnknownPageType = "Page type unknown"
 
const string net_ftpstatuscode_FileActionAborted = "Exceeded storage allocation (for current directory or data set)"
 
const string net_ftpstatuscode_ActionNotTakenFilenameNotAllowed = "File name not allowed"
 
const string net_invalid_host = "The specified value is not a valid Host header string."
 
const string net_sockets_connect_multiconnect_notsupported = "Sockets on this platform are invalid for use after a failed connection attempt."
 
const string net_sockets_dualmode_receivefrom_notsupported = "This platform does not support packet information for dual-mode sockets. If packet information is not required, use Socket.Receive. If packet information is required set Socket.DualMode to false."
 
const string net_sockets_accept_receive_notsupported = "This platform does not support receiving data with Socket.AcceptAsync. Instead, make a separate call to Socket.ReceiveAsync."
 
const string net_sockets_duplicateandclose_notsupported = "This platform does not support Socket.DuplicateAndClose. Instead, create a new socket."
 
const string net_sockets_transmitfileoptions_notsupported = "This platform does not support TransmitFileOptions other than TransmitFileOptions.UseDefaultWorkerThread."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_PathLengthInvalid = "The path '{0}' is of an invalid length for use with domain sockets on this platform. The length must be between 1 and {1} characters, inclusive."
 
const string net_io_readwritefailure = "Unable to transfer data on the transport connection: {0}."
 
const string PlatformNotSupported_AcceptSocket = "Accepting into an existing Socket is not supported on this platform."
 
const string PlatformNotSupported_IOControl = "Socket.IOControl handles Windows-specific control codes and is not supported on this platform."
 
const string PlatformNotSupported_IPProtectionLevel = "IP protection level cannot be controlled on this platform."
 
const string InvalidOperation_BufferNotExplicitArray = "This operation may only be performed when the buffer was set using the SetBuffer overload that accepts an array."
 
const string InvalidOperation_IncorrectToken = "The result of the operation was already consumed and may not be used again."
 
const string InvalidOperation_MultipleContinuations = "Another continuation was already registered."
 
const string net_http_httpmethod_format_error = "The format of the HTTP method is invalid."
 
const string net_http_httpmethod_notsupported_error = "The HTTP method '{0}' is not supported on this platform."
 
const string net_http_reasonphrase_format_error = "The reason phrase must not contain new-line characters."
 
const string net_http_copyto_array_too_small = "The number of elements is greater than the available space from arrayIndex to the end of the destination array."
 
const string net_http_headers_not_found = "The given header was not found."
 
const string net_http_headers_single_value_header = "Cannot add value because header '{0}' does not support multiple values."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_header_name = "The header name format is invalid."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_value = "The format of value '{0}' is invalid."
 
const string net_http_headers_not_allowed_header_name = "Misused header name. Make sure request headers are used with HttpRequestMessage, response headers with HttpResponseMessage, and content headers with HttpContent objects."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_host_header = "The specified value is not a valid 'Host' header string."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_from_header = "The specified value is not a valid 'From' header string."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_etag_name = "The specified value is not a valid quoted string."
 
const string net_http_headers_invalid_range = "Invalid range. At least one of the two parameters must not be null."
 
const string net_http_headers_no_newlines = "New-line characters in header values must be followed by a white-space character."
 
const string net_http_content_buffersize_exceeded = "Cannot write more bytes to the buffer than the configured maximum buffer size: {0}."
 
const string net_http_content_no_task_returned = "The async operation did not return a System.Threading.Tasks.Task object."
 
const string net_http_content_stream_already_read = "The stream was already consumed. It cannot be read again."
 
const string net_http_content_readonly_stream = "The stream does not support writing."
 
const string net_http_content_invalid_charset = "The character set provided in ContentType is invalid. Cannot read content as string using an invalid character set."
 
const string net_http_content_stream_copy_error = "Error while copying content to a stream."
 
const string net_http_argument_empty_string = "The value cannot be null or empty."
 
const string net_http_client_request_already_sent = "The request message was already sent. Cannot send the same request message multiple times."
 
const string net_http_operation_started = "This instance has already started one or more requests. Properties can only be modified before sending the first request."
 
const string net_http_client_execution_error = "An error occurred while sending the request."
 
const string net_http_client_absolute_baseaddress_required = "The base address must be an absolute URI."
 
const string net_http_client_invalid_requesturi = "An invalid request URI was provided. The request URI must either be an absolute URI or BaseAddress must be set."
 
const string net_http_client_http_baseaddress_required = "Only 'http' and 'https' schemes are allowed."
 
const string net_http_parser_invalid_base64_string = "Value '{0}' is not a valid Base64 string. Error: {1}"
 
const string net_http_handler_noresponse = "Handler did not return a response message."
 
const string net_http_handler_norequest = "A request message must be provided. It cannot be null."
 
const string net_http_message_not_success_statuscode = "Response status code does not indicate success: {0} ({1})."
 
const string net_http_content_field_too_long = "The field cannot be longer than {0} characters."
 
const string net_http_log_headers_no_newlines = "Value for header '{0}' contains invalid new-line characters. Value: '{1}'."
 
const string net_http_log_headers_invalid_quality = "The 'q' value is invalid: '{0}'."
 
const string net_http_log_headers_wrong_email_format = "Value '{0}' is not a valid email address. Error: {1}"
 
const string net_http_handler_not_assigned = "The inner handler has not been assigned."
 
const string net_http_invalid_enable_first = "The {0} property must be set to '{1}' to use this property."
 
const string net_http_content_buffersize_limit = "Buffering more than {0} bytes is not supported."
 
const string net_http_value_not_supported = "The value '{0}' is not supported for property '{1}'."
 
const string net_http_io_read = "The read operation failed, see inner exception."
 
const string net_http_io_read_incomplete = "Unable to read data from the transport connection. The connection was closed before all data could be read. Expected {0} bytes, read {1} bytes."
 
const string net_http_io_write = "The write operation failed, see inner exception."
 
const string net_http_chunked_not_allowed_with_empty_content = "'Transfer-Encoding: chunked' header can not be used when content object is not specified."
 
const string net_http_invalid_cookiecontainer = "When using CookieUsePolicy.UseSpecifiedCookieContainer, the CookieContainer property must not be null."
 
const string net_http_invalid_proxyusepolicy = "When using a non-null Proxy, the WindowsProxyUsePolicy property must be set to WindowsProxyUsePolicy.UseCustomProxy."
 
const string net_http_invalid_proxy = "When using WindowsProxyUsePolicy.UseCustomProxy, the Proxy property must not be null."
 
const string net_http_value_must_be_greater_than = "The specified value must be greater than {0}."
 
const string net_http_unix_invalid_credential = "The libcurl library in use ({0}) does not support different credentials for different authentication schemes."
 
const string net_http_unix_https_support_unavailable_libcurl = "The libcurl library in use ({0}) does not support HTTPS."
 
const string net_http_content_no_concurrent_reads = "The stream does not support concurrent read operations."
 
const string net_http_username_empty_string = "The username for a credential object cannot be null or empty."
 
const string net_http_no_concurrent_io_allowed = "The stream does not support concurrent I/O read or write operations."
 
const string net_http_invalid_response = "The server returned an invalid or unrecognized response."
 
const string net_http_unix_handler_disposed = "The handler was disposed of while active operations were in progress."
 
const string net_http_buffer_insufficient_length = "The buffer was not long enough."
 
const string net_http_response_headers_exceeded_length = "The HTTP response headers length exceeded the set limit of {0} bytes."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NeedNonNegativeNum = "Non-negative number required."
 
const string net_http_libcurl_callback_notsupported_sslbackend = "The handler does not support custom handling of certificates with this combination of libcurl ({0}) and its SSL backend (\"{1}\"). An SSL backend based on \"{2}\" is required. Consider using System.Net.Http.SocketsHttpHandler."
 
const string net_http_libcurl_callback_notsupported_os = "The handler does not support custom handling of certificates on this operating system. Consider using System.Net.Http.SocketsHttpHandler."
 
const string net_http_libcurl_clientcerts_notsupported_sslbackend = "The handler does not support client authentication certificates with this combination of libcurl ({0}) and its SSL backend (\"{1}\"). An SSL backend based on \"{2}\" is required. Consider using System.Net.Http.SocketsHttpHandler."
 
const string net_http_libcurl_clientcerts_notsupported_os = "The handler does not support client authentication certificates on this operating system. Consider using System.Net.Http.SocketsHttpHandler."
 
const string net_http_libcurl_revocation_notsupported_sslbackend = "The handler does not support changing revocation settings with this combination of libcurl ({0}) and its SSL backend (\"{1}\"). An SSL backend based on \"{2}\" is required. Consider using System.Net.Http.SocketsHttpHandler."
 
const string net_http_feature_requires_Windows10Version1607 = "Using this feature requires Windows 10 Version 1607."
 
const string net_http_feature_UWPClientCertSupportRequiresCertInPersonalCertificateStore = "Client certificate was not found in the personal (\\\"MY\\\") certificate store. In UWP, client certificates are only supported if they have been added to that certificate store."
 
const string net_http_invalid_proxy_scheme = "Only the 'http' scheme is allowed for proxies."
 
const string net_http_request_invalid_char_encoding = "Request headers must contain only ASCII characters."
 
const string net_http_ssl_connection_failed = "The SSL connection could not be established, see inner exception."
 
const string net_http_unsupported_chunking = "HTTP 1.0 does not support chunking."
 
const string net_http_unsupported_version = "Request HttpVersion 0.X is not supported. Use 1.0 or above."
 
const string IO_SeekBeforeBegin = "An attempt was made to move the position before the beginning of the stream."
 
const string net_http_request_no_host = "CONNECT request must contain Host header."
 
const string net_http_winhttp_error = "Error {0} calling {1}, '{2}'."
 
const string net_http_authconnectionfailure = "Authentication failed because the connection could not be reused."
 
const string net_nego_server_not_supported = "Server implementation is not supported"
 
const string net_nego_protection_level_not_supported = "Requested protection level is not supported with the gssapi implementation currently installed."
 
const string net_context_buffer_too_small = "Insufficient buffer space. Required: {0} Actual: {1}."

const string ZeroLengthString = "String cannot have zero length."
 
const string EntryPointNotFound = "Entry point not found in assembly"
 
const string Arg_ContextMarshalException = "Attempted to marshal an object across a context boundary."
 
const string AppDomain_Policy_PrincipalTwice = "Default principal object cannot be set twice."

const string ArgumentOutOfRange_ArrayListInsert = "Insertion index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than or equal to size."

const string NotSupported_FixedSizeCollection = "Collection was of a fixed size."

const string NotSupported_ReadOnlyCollection = "Collection is read-only."

const string PlatformNotSupported_RuntimeInformation = "RuntimeInformation is not supported for Portable Class Libraries."

const string Cryptography_SSE_InvalidDataSize = "NoLength of the data to encrypt is invalid."

const string ObjectDisposed_Generic = "Cannot access a disposed object."
 
const string Cryptography_Asn_EnumeratedValueRequiresNonFlagsEnum = "ASN.1 Enumerated values only apply to enum types without the [Flags] attribute."
 
const string Cryptography_Asn_NamedBitListRequiresFlagsEnum = "Named bit list operations require an enum with the [Flags] attribute."
 
const string Cryptography_Asn_NamedBitListValueTooBig = "The encoded named bit list value is larger than the value size of the '{0}' enum."
 
const string Cryptography_Asn_UniversalValueIsFixed = "Tags with TagClass Universal must have the appropriate TagValue value for the data type being read or written."
 
const string Cryptography_Asn_UnusedBitCountRange = "Unused bit count must be between 0 and 7, inclusive."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_AmbiguousFieldType = "Field '{0}' of type '{1}' has ambiguous type '{2}', an attribute derived from AsnTypeAttribute is required."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_AllowNullNonNullable = "[Choice].AllowNull=true is not valid because type '{0}' cannot have a null value."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_ConflictingTagMapping = "The tag ({0} {1}) for field '{2}' on type '{3}' already is associated in this context with field '{4}' on type '{5}'."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_DefaultValueDisallowed = "Field '{0}' on [Choice] type '{1}' has a default value, which is not permitted."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_NoChoiceWasMade = "An instance of [Choice] type '{0}' has no non-null fields."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_NonNullableField = "Field '{0}' on [Choice] type '{1}' can not be assigned a null value."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_TooManyValues = "Fields '{0}' and '{1}' on type '{2}' are both non-null when only one value is permitted."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Choice_TypeCycle = "Field '{0}' on [Choice] type '{1}' has introduced a type chain cycle."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_MultipleAsnTypeAttributes = "Field '{0}' on type '{1}' has multiple attributes deriving from '{2}' when at most one is permitted."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_NoJaggedArrays = "Type '{0}' cannot be serialized or deserialized because it is an array of arrays."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_NoMultiDimensionalArrays = "Type '{0}' cannot be serialized or deserialized because it is a multi-dimensional array."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_NoOpenTypes = "Type '{0}' cannot be serialized or deserialized because it is not sealed or has unbound generic parameters."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_Optional_NonNullableField = "Field '{0}' on type '{1}' is declared [OptionalValue], but it can not be assigned a null value."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_PopulateFriendlyNameOnString = "Field '{0}' on type '{1}' has [ObjectIdentifier].PopulateFriendlyName set to true, which is not applicable to a string. Change the field to '{2}' or set PopulateFriendlyName to false."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_SetValueException = "Unable to set field {0} on type {1}."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_SpecificTagChoice = "Field '{0}' on type '{1}' has specified an implicit tag value via [ExpectedTag] for [Choice] type '{2}'. ExplicitTag must be true, or the [ExpectedTag] attribute removed."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_UnexpectedTypeForAttribute = "Field '{0}' of type '{1}' has an effective type of '{2}' when one of ({3}) was expected."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_UtcTimeTwoDigitYearMaxTooSmall = "Field '{0}' on type '{1}' has a [UtcTime] TwoDigitYearMax value ({2}) smaller than the minimum (99)."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnSerializer_UnhandledType = "Could not determine how to serialize or deserialize type '{0}'."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnWriter_EncodeUnbalancedStack = "Encode cannot be called while a Sequence or SetOf is still open."
 
const string Cryptography_AsnWriter_PopWrongTag = "Cannot pop the requested tag as it is not currently in progress."

const string Cryptography_Cms_MissingAuthenticatedAttribute = "The cryptographic message does not contain an expected authenticated attribute."
 
const string Cryptography_Cms_NoCounterCounterSigner = "Only one level of counter-signatures are supported on this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_Cms_NoRecipients = "The recipients collection is empty. You must specify at least one recipient. This platform does not implement the certificate picker UI."
 
const string Cryptography_Cms_NoSignerCert = "No signer certificate was provided. This platform does not implement the certificate picker UI."
 
const string Cryptography_Cms_NoSignerAtIndex = "The signed cryptographic message does not have a signer for the specified signer index."
 
const string Cryptography_Cms_RecipientNotFound = "The enveloped-data message does not contain the specified recipient."

const string Cryptography_Cms_TrustFailure = "Certificate trust could not be established. The first reported error is: {0}"

const string Cryptography_Cms_UnknownKeySpec = "Unable to determine the type of key handle from this keyspec {0}."

const string Cryptography_Pkcs_PssParametersMissing = "PSS parameters were not present."

const string Cryptography_Pkcs_PssParametersMgfNotSupported = "Mask generation function '{0}' is not supported by this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_Pkcs_PssParametersSaltMismatch = "PSS salt size {0} is not supported by this platform with hash algorithm {1}."

const string Cryptography_TimestampReq_BadResponse = "The response from the timestamping server was not understood."
 
const string Cryptography_TimestampReq_Failure = "The timestamping server did not grant the request. The request status is '{0}' with failure info '{1}'."

const string InvalidOperation_WrongOidInAsnCollection = "AsnEncodedData element in the collection has wrong Oid value: expected = '{0}', actual = '{1}'."

const string Cryptography_Invalid_IA5String = "The string contains a character not in the 7 bit ASCII character set."
 
const string Cryptography_UnknownHashAlgorithm = "'{0}' is not a known hash algorithm."
 
const string Cryptography_WriteEncodedValue_OneValueAtATime = "The input to WriteEncodedValue must represent a single encoded value with no trailing data."
 
const string Arg_CryptographyException = "Error occurred during a cryptographic operation."
 
const string Cryptography_CryptoStream_FlushFinalBlockTwice = "FlushFinalBlock() method was called twice on a CryptoStream. It can only be called once."
 
const string Cryptography_DefaultAlgorithm_NotSupported = "This platform does not allow the automatic selection of an algorithm."
 
const string Cryptography_HashNotYetFinalized = "Hash must be finalized before the hash value is retrieved."

const string Cryptography_InvalidKeySize = "Specified key is not a valid size for this algorithm."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidPaddingMode = "Specified padding mode is not valid for this algorithm."

const string CryptoConfigNotSupported = "Accessing a hash algorithm by manipulating the HashName property is not supported on this platform. Instead, you must instantiate one of the supplied subtypes (such as HMACSHA1.)"
 
const string InvalidOperation_IncorrectImplementation = "The algorithm's implementation is incorrect."

const string Cryptography_Partial_Chain = "A certificate chain could not be built to a trusted root authority."

const string Cryptography_Xml_DigestValueRequired = "A Reference must contain a DigestValue."
 
const string Cryptography_Xml_EnvelopedSignatureRequiresContext = "An XmlDocument context is required for enveloped transforms."
 
const string Cryptography_Xml_InvalidElement = "Malformed element {0}."

const string Cryptography_Xml_InvalidKeySize = "The key size should be a non negative integer."

const string Cryptography_Xml_InvalidSignatureLength = "The length of the signature with a MAC should be less than the hash output length."

const string Cryptography_Xml_InvalidX509IssuerSerialNumber = "X509 issuer serial number is invalid."
 
const string Cryptography_Xml_KeyInfoRequired = "A KeyInfo element is required to check the signature."

const string Chain_NoPolicyMatch = "The certificate has invalid policy."
 
const string Cryptography_BadHashSize_ForAlgorithm = "The provided value of {0} bytes does not match the expected size of {1} bytes for the algorithm ({2})."
 
const string Cryptography_Cert_AlreadyHasPrivateKey = "The certificate already has an associated private key."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_AlgorithmMustMatch = "The issuer certificate public key algorithm ({0}) does not match the value for this certificate request ({1}), use the X509SignatureGenerator overload."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_BasicConstraintsRequired = "The issuer certificate does not have a Basic Constraints extension."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_DatesReversed = "The provided notBefore value is later than the notAfter value."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_DateTooOld = "The value predates 1950 and has no defined encoding."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_DuplicateExtension = "An X509Extension with OID '{0}' has already been specified."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_IssuerBasicConstraintsInvalid = "The issuer certificate does not have an appropriate value for the Basic Constraints extension."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_IssuerKeyUsageInvalid = "The issuer certificate's Key Usage extension is present but does not contain the KeyCertSign flag."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_IssuerRequiresPrivateKey = "The provided issuer certificate does not have an associated private key."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_NotAfterNotNested = "The requested notAfter value ({0}) is later than issuerCertificate.NotAfter ({1})."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_NotBeforeNotNested = "The requested notBefore value ({0}) is earlier than issuerCertificate.NotBefore ({1})."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_NoKeyProvided = "This method cannot be used since no signing key was provided via a constructor, use an overload accepting an X509SignatureGenerator instead."
 
const string Cryptography_CertReq_RSAPaddingRequired = "The issuer certificate uses an RSA key but no RSASignaturePadding was provided to a constructor. If one cannot be provided, use the X509SignatureGenerator overload."
 
const string Cryptography_CSP_NoPrivateKey = "Object contains only the public half of a key pair. A private key must also be provided."
 
const string Cryptography_CurveNotSupported = "The specified curve '{0}' or its parameters are not valid for this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_ECC_NamedCurvesOnly = "Only named curves are supported on this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_Encryption_MessageTooLong = "The message exceeds the maximum allowable length for the chosen options ({0})."
 
const string Cryptography_HashAlgorithmNameNullOrEmpty = "The hash algorithm name cannot be null or empty."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidOID = "Object identifier (OID) is unknown."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidPublicKey_Object = "The provided PublicKey object is invalid, valid Oid and EncodedKeyValue property values are required."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidRsaParameters = "The specified RSA parameters are not valid; both Exponent and Modulus are required fields."
 
const string Cryptography_KeyTooSmall = "The key is too small for the requested operation."
 
const string Cryptography_OAEP_Decryption_Failed = "Error occurred while decoding OAEP padding."
 
const string Cryptography_OpenInvalidHandle = "Cannot open an invalid handle."
 
const string Cryptography_PrivateKey_DoesNotMatch = "The provided key does not match the public key for this certificate."
 
const string Cryptography_PrivateKey_WrongAlgorithm = "The provided key does not match the public key algorithm for this certificate."
 
const string Cryptography_RSA_DecryptWrongSize = "The length of the data to decrypt is not valid for the size of this key."
 
const string Cryptography_SignHash_WrongSize = "The provided hash value is not the expected size for the specified hash algorithm."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_DisallowedStoreNotEmpty = "The Disallowed store is not supported on this platform, but already has data. All files under '{0}' must be removed."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_MachineStoresReadOnly = "Unix LocalMachine X509Stores are read-only for all users."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_MachineStoresRootOnly = "Unix LocalMachine X509Store is limited to the Root and CertificateAuthority stores."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_NoDisallowedStore = "The Disallowed store is not supported on this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_PropertyNotSettable = "The {0} value cannot be set on Unix."
 
const string Cryptography_UnknownKeyAlgorithm = "'{0}' is not a known key algorithm."
 
const string Cryptography_Unix_X509_SerializedExport = "X509ContentType.SerializedCert and X509ContentType.SerializedStore are not supported on Unix."
 
const string Cryptography_Unmapped_System_Typed_Error = "The system cryptographic library returned error '{0}' of type '{1}'"

const string Cryptography_X509_PKCS7_NoSigner = "Cannot find the original signer."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_StoreAddFailure = "The X509 certificate could not be added to the store."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_StoreNoFileAvailable = "The X509 certificate could not be added to the store because all candidate file names were in use."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_StoreNotFound = "The specified X509 certificate store does not exist."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_StoreReadOnly = "The X509 certificate store is read-only."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_StoreCannotCreate = "The platform does not have a definition for an X509 certificate store named '{0}' with a StoreLocation of '{1}', and does not support creating it."
 
const string NotSupported_ECDsa_Csp = "CryptoApi ECDsa keys are not supported."
 
const string NotSupported_Export_MultiplePrivateCerts = "Only one certificate with a private key can be exported in a single PFX."
 
const string NotSupported_LegacyBasicConstraints = "The X509 Basic Constraints extension with OID 2.5.29.10 is not supported."
 
const string NotSupported_ImmutableX509Certificate = "X509Certificate is immutable on this platform. Use the equivalent constructor instead."
 
const string Security_AccessDenied = "Access is denied."
 
const string Cryptography_FileStatusError = "Unable to get file status."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDirectoryPermissions = "Invalid directory permissions. The directory '{0}' must be readable, writable and executable by the owner."
 
const string Cryptography_OwnerNotCurrentUser = "The owner of '{0}' is not the current user."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidFilePermissions = "Invalid file permissions. The file '{0}' must readable and writable by the current owner and by no one else, and the permissions could not be changed to meet that criteria."
 
const string Cryptography_Invalid_X500Name = "The string contains an invalid X500 name attribute key, oid, value or delimiter."
 
const string Cryptography_X509_NoEphemeralPfx = "This platform does not support loading with EphemeralKeySet. Remove the flag to allow keys to be temporarily created on disk."
 
const string Cryptography_X509Store_WouldModifyUserTrust = "Removing the requested certificate would modify user trust settings, and has been denied."
 
const string Cryptography_X509Store_WouldModifyAdminTrust = "Removing the requested certificate would modify admin trust settings, and has been denied."
 
const string Cryptography_DSA_KeyGenNotSupported = "DSA keys can be imported, but new key generation is not supported on this platform."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_MissingFields = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; P, Q, G and Y are all required."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_MismatchedPGY = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; P, G and Y must be the same length (the key size)."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_MismatchedQX = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; Q and X (if present) must be the same length."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_MismatchedPJ = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; J (if present) must be shorter than P."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_SeedRestriction_ShortKey = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; Seed, if present, must be 20 bytes long for keys shorter than 1024 bits."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_QRestriction_ShortKey = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; Q must be 20 bytes long for keys shorter than 1024 bits."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidDsaParameters_QRestriction_LargeKey = "The specified DSA parameters are not valid; Q's length must be one of 20, 32 or 64 bytes."
 
const string InvalidEmptyArgument = "Argument {0} cannot be zero-length."

const string Parallel_ForEach_PartitionerReturnedNull = "The Partitioner used here returned a null partitioner source."
 
const string Parallel_ForEach_NullEnumerator = "The Partitioner source returned a null enumerator."

const string Arg_CannotHaveNegativeValue = "String cannot contain a minus sign if the base is not 10."
 
const string Arg_CopyNonBlittableArray = "Arrays must contain only blittable data in order to be copied to unmanaged memory."

const string Arg_DecBitCtor = "Decimal byte array constructor requires an array of length four containing valid decimal bytes."
 
const string Arg_DivideByZero = "Attempted to divide by zero."

const string Arg_DlgtTypeMis = "Delegates must be of the same type."

const string Arg_EHClauseNotFilter = "This ExceptionHandlingClause is not a filter."
 
const string Arg_EnumAndObjectMustBeSameType = "Object must be the same type as the enum. The type passed in was '{0}'; the enum type was '{1}'."

const string Arg_FormatException = "One of the identified items was in an invalid format."
 
const string Arg_GuidArrayCtor = "Byte array for GUID must be exactly {0} bytes long."

const string Arg_IndexOutOfRangeException = "Index was outside the bounds of the array."

const string Arg_InvalidCastException = "Specified cast is not valid."
 
const string Arg_InvalidHexStyle = "With the AllowHexSpecifier bit set in the enum bit field, the only other valid bits that can be combined into the enum value must be a subset of those in HexNumber."

const string Arg_KeyNotFound = "The given key was not present in the dictionary."
 
const string Arg_LongerThanSrcString = "Source string was not long enough. Check sourceIndex and count."

const string Arg_NegativeArgCount = "Argument count must not be negative."

const string Arg_NotGenericParameter = "Method may only be called on a Type for which Type.IsGenericParameter is true."

const string Arg_NotSupportedException = "Specified method is not supported."
 
const string Arg_NotSupportedNonZeroLowerBound = "Arrays with non-zero lower bounds are not supported."

const string Arg_RankException = "Attempted to operate on an array with the incorrect number of dimensions."
 
const string Arg_RankIndices = "Indices length does not match the array rank."
 
const string Arg_RanksAndBounds = "Number of lengths and lowerBounds must match."
 
const string Arg_RegGetOverflowBug = "RegistryKey.GetValue does not allow a String that has a length greater than Int32.MaxValue."
 
const string Arg_RegKeyNotFound = "The specified registry key does not exist."
 
const string Arg_RegInvalidKeyName = "Registry key name must start with a valid base key name."
 
const string Arg_StackOverflowException = "Operation caused a stack overflow."
 
const string Arg_SynchronizationLockException = "Object synchronization method was called from an unsynchronized block of code."
