const string Arg_ThreadStartException = "Thread failed to start."
 
const string Arg_ThreadStateException = "Thread was in an invalid state for the operation being executed."
 
const string Arg_TimeoutException = "The operation has timed out."
 
const string Arg_TypeAccessException = "Attempt to access the type failed."
 
const string Arg_TypeLoadException = "Failure has occurred while loading a type."
 
const string Arg_UnauthorizedAccessException = "Attempted to perform an unauthorized operation."
 
const string Arg_VersionString = "Version string portion was too short or too long."
 
const string Argument_AbsolutePathRequired = "Absolute path information is required."
 
const string Argument_AdjustmentRulesNoNulls = "The AdjustmentRule array cannot contain null elements."
 
const string Argument_AdjustmentRulesOutOfOrder = "The elements of the AdjustmentRule array must be in chronological order and must not overlap."
 
const string Argument_CodepageNotSupported = "{0} is not a supported code page."
 
const string Argument_CompareOptionOrdinal = "CompareOption.Ordinal cannot be used with other options."
 
const string Argument_ConflictingDateTimeRoundtripStyles = "The DateTimeStyles value RoundtripKind cannot be used with the values AssumeLocal, AssumeUniversal or AdjustToUniversal."
 
const string Argument_ConflictingDateTimeStyles = "The DateTimeStyles values AssumeLocal and AssumeUniversal cannot be used together."
 
const string Argument_ConversionOverflow = "Conversion buffer overflow."
 
const string Argument_ConvertMismatch = "The conversion could not be completed because the supplied DateTime did not have the Kind property set correctly. For example, when the Kind property is DateTimeKind.Local, the source time zone must be TimeZoneInfo.Local."
 
const string Argument_CultureInvalidIdentifier = "{0} is an invalid culture identifier."
 
const string Argument_CultureIetfNotSupported = "Culture IETF Name {0} is not a recognized IETF name."
 
const string Argument_CultureIsNeutral = "Culture ID {0} (0x{0:X4}) is a neutral culture; a region cannot be created from it."
 
const string Argument_CultureNotSupported = "Culture is not supported."
 
const string Argument_CustomCultureCannotBePassedByNumber = "Customized cultures cannot be passed by LCID, only by name."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeBadBinaryData = "The binary data must result in a DateTime with ticks between DateTime.MinValue.Ticks and DateTime.MaxValue.Ticks."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeHasTicks = "The supplied DateTime must have the Year, Month, and Day properties set to 1. The time cannot be specified more precisely than whole milliseconds."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeHasTimeOfDay = "The supplied DateTime includes a TimeOfDay setting. This is not supported."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeIsInvalid = "The supplied DateTime represents an invalid time. For example, when the clock is adjusted forward, any time in the period that is skipped is invalid."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeIsNotAmbiguous = "The supplied DateTime is not in an ambiguous time range."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeKindMustBeUnspecified = "The supplied DateTime must have the Kind property set to DateTimeKind.Unspecified."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeKindMustBeUnspecifiedOrUtc = "The supplied DateTime must have the Kind property set to DateTimeKind.Unspecified or DateTimeKind.Utc."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeOffsetInvalidDateTimeStyles = "The DateTimeStyles value 'NoCurrentDateDefault' is not allowed when parsing DateTimeOffset."
 
const string Argument_DateTimeOffsetIsNotAmbiguous = "The supplied DateTimeOffset is not in an ambiguous time range."
 
const string Argument_EmptyDecString = "Decimal separator cannot be the empty string."
 
const string Argument_EmptyName = "Empty name is not legal."
 
const string Argument_EmptyWaithandleArray = "Waithandle array may not be empty."
 
const string Argument_EncoderFallbackNotEmpty = "Must complete Convert() operation or call Encoder.Reset() before calling GetBytes() or GetByteCount(). Encoder '{0}' fallback '{1}'."
 
const string Argument_EncodingConversionOverflowBytes = "The output byte buffer is too small to contain the encoded data, encoding '{0}' fallback '{1}'."
 
const string Argument_EncodingConversionOverflowChars = "The output char buffer is too small to contain the decoded characters, encoding '{0}' fallback '{1}'."
 
const string Argument_EncodingNotSupported = "'{0}' is not a supported encoding name. For information on defining a custom encoding, see the documentation for the Encoding.RegisterProvider method."
 
const string Argument_EnumTypeDoesNotMatch = "The argument type, '{0}', is not the same as the enum type '{1}'."
 
const string Argument_FallbackBufferNotEmpty = "Cannot change fallback when buffer is not empty. Previous Convert() call left data in the fallback buffer."
 
const string Argument_InvalidArgumentForComparison = "Type of argument is not compatible with the generic comparer."
 
const string Argument_InvalidArrayLength = "Length of the array must be {0}."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCalendar = "Not a valid calendar for the given culture."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCharSequence = "Invalid Unicode code point found at index {0}."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCharSequenceNoIndex = "String contains invalid Unicode code points."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCodePageBytesIndex = "Unable to translate bytes {0} at index {1} from specified code page to Unicode."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCodePageConversionIndex = "Unable to translate Unicode character \\\\u{0:X4} at index {1} to specified code page."
 
const string Argument_InvalidCultureName = "Culture name '{0}' is not supported."
 
const string Argument_InvalidDateTimeKind = "Invalid DateTimeKind value."
 
const string Argument_InvalidDateTimeStyles = "An undefined DateTimeStyles value is being used."
 
const string Argument_InvalidDigitSubstitution = "The DigitSubstitution property must be of a valid member of the DigitShapes enumeration. Valid entries include Context, NativeNational or None."
 
const string Argument_InvalidEnumValue = "The value '{0}' is not valid for this usage of the type {1}."
 
const string Argument_InvalidGroupSize = "Every element in the value array should be between one and nine, except for the last element, which can be zero."
 
const string Argument_InvalidHighSurrogate = "Found a high surrogate char without a following low surrogate at index: {0}. The input may not be in this encoding, or may not contain valid Unicode (UTF-16) characters."
 
const string Argument_InvalidId = "The specified ID parameter '{0}' is not supported."
 
const string Argument_InvalidLowSurrogate = "Found a low surrogate char without a preceding high surrogate at index: {0}. The input may not be in this encoding, or may not contain valid Unicode (UTF-16) characters."
 
const string Argument_InvalidNativeDigitCount = "The NativeDigits array must contain exactly ten members."
 
const string Argument_InvalidNativeDigitValue = "Each member of the NativeDigits array must be a single text element (one or more UTF16 code points) with a Unicode Nd (Number, Decimal Digit) property indicating it is a digit."
 
const string Argument_InvalidNeutralRegionName = "The region name {0} should not correspond to neutral culture; a specific culture name is required."
 
const string Argument_InvalidNormalizationForm = "Invalid normalization form."
 
const string Argument_InvalidREG_TZI_FORMAT = "The REG_TZI_FORMAT structure is corrupt."
 
const string Argument_InvalidResourceCultureName = "The given culture name '{0}' cannot be used to locate a resource file. Resource filenames must consist of only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores."
 
const string Argument_InvalidSerializedString = "The specified serialized string '{0}' is not supported."
 
const string Argument_InvalidTimeSpanStyles = "An undefined TimeSpanStyles value is being used."
 
const string Argument_MustBeFalse = "Argument must be initialized to false"
 
const string Argument_MustBeRuntimeType = "Type must be a runtime Type object."
 
const string Argument_NoEra = "No Era was supplied."
 
const string Argument_NoRegionInvariantCulture = "There is no region associated with the Invariant Culture (Culture ID: 0x7F)."
 
const string Argument_NotIsomorphic = "Object contains non-primitive or non-blittable data."
 
const string Argument_OffsetLocalMismatch = "The UTC Offset of the local dateTime parameter does not match the offset argument."
 
const string Argument_OffsetPrecision = "Offset must be specified in whole minutes."
 
const string Argument_OffsetOutOfRange = "Offset must be within plus or minus 14 hours."
 
const string Argument_OffsetUtcMismatch = "The UTC Offset for Utc DateTime instances must be 0."
 
const string Argument_OneOfCulturesNotSupported = "Culture name {0} or {1} is not supported."
 
const string Argument_OnlyMscorlib = "Only mscorlib's assembly is valid."
 
const string Argument_OutOfOrderDateTimes = "The DateStart property must come before the DateEnd property."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_HugeArrayNotSupported = "Arrays larger than 2GB are not supported."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Length = "The specified length exceeds maximum capacity of SecureString."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_LengthTooLarge = "The specified length exceeds the maximum value of {0}."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NeedValidId = "The ID parameter must be in the range {0} through {1}."
 
const string Argument_InvalidTypeName = "The name of the type is invalid."
 
const string Argument_PathFormatNotSupported_Path = "The format of the path '{0}' is not supported."
 
const string Argument_RecursiveFallback = "Recursive fallback not allowed for character \\\\u{0:X4}."
 
const string Argument_RecursiveFallbackBytes = "Recursive fallback not allowed for bytes {0}."
 
const string Argument_ResultCalendarRange = "The result is out of the supported range for this calendar. The result should be between {0} (Gregorian date) and {1} (Gregorian date), inclusive."
 
const string Argument_TimeSpanHasSeconds = "The TimeSpan parameter cannot be specified more precisely than whole minutes."
 
const string Argument_TimeZoneNotFound = "The time zone ID '{0}' was not found on the local computer."
 
const string Argument_TimeZoneInfoBadTZif = "The tzfile does not begin with the magic characters 'TZif'. Please verify that the file is not corrupt."
 
const string Argument_TimeZoneInfoInvalidTZif = "The TZif data structure is corrupt."
 
const string Argument_ToExclusiveLessThanFromExclusive = "fromInclusive must be less than or equal to toExclusive."
 
const string Argument_TransitionTimesAreIdentical = "The DaylightTransitionStart property must not equal the DaylightTransitionEnd property."
 
const string Argument_UTCOutOfRange = "The UTC time represented when the offset is applied must be between year 0 and 10,000."
 
const string ArgumentException_OtherNotArrayOfCorrectLength = "Object is not a array with the same number of elements as the array to compare it to."
 
const string ArgumentException_TupleIncorrectType = "Argument must be of type {0}."
 
const string ArgumentException_TupleLastArgumentNotATuple = "The last element of an eight element tuple must be a Tuple."
 
const string ArgumentException_ValueTupleIncorrectType = "Argument must be of type {0}."
 
const string ArgumentException_ValueTupleLastArgumentNotAValueTuple = "The last element of an eight element ValueTuple must be a ValueTuple."
 
const string ArgumentNull_ArrayElement = "At least one element in the specified array was null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_ArrayValue = "Found a null value within an array."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Generic = "Value cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Obj = "Object cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_String = "String reference not set to an instance of a String."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Type = "Type cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentNull_Waithandles = "The waitHandles parameter cannot be null."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_AddValue = "Value to add was out of range."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_ActualValue = "Actual value was {0}."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_BadYearMonthDay = "Year, Month, and Day parameters describe an un-representable DateTime."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_BadHourMinuteSecond = "Hour, Minute, and Second parameters describe an un-representable DateTime."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_CalendarRange = "Specified time is not supported in this calendar. It should be between {0} (Gregorian date) and {1} (Gregorian date), inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Capacity = "Capacity exceeds maximum capacity."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DateArithmetic = "The added or subtracted value results in an un-representable DateTime."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DateTimeBadMonths = "Months value must be between +/-120000."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DateTimeBadTicks = "Ticks must be between DateTime.MinValue.Ticks and DateTime.MaxValue.Ticks."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DateTimeBadYears = "Years value must be between +/-10000."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Day = "Day must be between 1 and {0} for month {1}."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DayOfWeek = "The DayOfWeek enumeration must be in the range 0 through 6."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DayParam = "The Day parameter must be in the range 1 through 31."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DecimalRound = "Decimal can only round to between 0 and 28 digits of precision."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_DecimalScale = "Decimal's scale value must be between 0 and 28, inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_EndIndexStartIndex = "endIndex cannot be greater than startIndex."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Era = "Time value was out of era range."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_FileTimeInvalid = "Not a valid Win32 FileTime."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_GetByteCountOverflow = "Too many characters. The resulting number of bytes is larger than what can be returned as an int."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_GetCharCountOverflow = "Too many bytes. The resulting number of chars is larger than what can be returned as an int."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexCount = "Index and count must refer to a location within the string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexCountBuffer = "Index and count must refer to a location within the buffer."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexLength = "Index and length must refer to a location within the string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexString = "Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the length of the string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_InvalidEraValue = "Era value was not valid."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_InvalidHighSurrogate = "A valid high surrogate character is between 0xd800 and 0xdbff, inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_InvalidLowSurrogate = "A valid low surrogate character is between 0xdc00 and 0xdfff, inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_InvalidUTF32 = "A valid UTF32 value is between 0x000000 and 0x10ffff, inclusive, and should not include surrogate codepoint values (0x00d800 ~ 0x00dfff)."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_LengthGreaterThanCapacity = "The length cannot be greater than the capacity."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_ListInsert = "Index must be within the bounds of the List."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_ListItem = "Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the list."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_ListRemoveAt = "Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the list."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Month = "Month must be between one and twelve."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_MonthParam = "The Month parameter must be in the range 1 through 12."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_MustBeNonNegInt32 = "Value must be non-negative and less than or equal to Int32.MaxValue."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NeedNonNegOrNegative1 = "Number must be either non-negative and less than or equal to Int32.MaxValue or -1."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NegativeCapacity = "Capacity must be positive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NegativeCount = "Count cannot be less than zero."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NegativeLength = "Length cannot be less than zero."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_NoGCLohSizeGreaterTotalSize = "lohSize can't be greater than totalSize"
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_OffsetLength = "Offset and length must refer to a position in the string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_OffsetOut = "Either offset did not refer to a position in the string, or there is an insufficient length of destination character array."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_PartialWCHAR = "Pointer startIndex and length do not refer to a valid string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Range = "Valid values are between {0} and {1}, inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_RoundingDigits = "Rounding digits must be between 0 and 15, inclusive."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_SmallMaxCapacity = "MaxCapacity must be one or greater."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_StartIndex = "StartIndex cannot be less than zero."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_StartIndexLargerThanLength = "startIndex cannot be larger than length of string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_StartIndexLessThanLength = "startIndex must be less than length of string."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_UtcOffset = "The TimeSpan parameter must be within plus or minus 14.0 hours."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_UtcOffsetAndDaylightDelta = "The sum of the BaseUtcOffset and DaylightDelta properties must within plus or minus 14.0 hours."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Version = "Version's parameters must be greater than or equal to zero."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Week = "The Week parameter must be in the range 1 through 5."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_Year = "Year must be between 1 and 9999."

const string ArrayTypeMismatch_CantAssignType = "Source array type cannot be assigned to destination array type."

const string Format_NoFormatSpecifier = "No format specifiers were provided."
 
const string Format_BadQuote = "Cannot find a matching quote character for the character '{0}'."
 
const string Format_EmptyInputString = "Input string was either empty or contained only whitespace."
 
const string Format_GuidHexPrefix = "Expected hex 0x in '{0}'."
 
const string Format_GuidInvLen = "Guid should contain 32 digits with 4 dashes (xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)."
 
const string Format_GuidInvalidChar = "Guid string should only contain hexadecimal characters."
 
const string Format_GuidBrace = "Expected {0xdddddddd, etc}."
 
const string Format_GuidComma = "Could not find a comma, or the length between the previous token and the comma was zero (i.e., '0x,'etc.)."
 
const string Format_GuidBraceAfterLastNumber = "Could not find a brace, or the length between the previous token and the brace was zero (i.e., '0x,'etc.)."
 
const string Format_GuidDashes = "Dashes are in the wrong position for GUID parsing."
 
const string Format_GuidEndBrace = "Could not find the ending brace."
 
const string Format_ExtraJunkAtEnd = "Additional non-parsable characters are at the end of the string."
 
const string Format_GuidUnrecognized = "Unrecognized Guid format."
 
const string Format_IndexOutOfRange = "Index (zero based) must be greater than or equal to zero and less than the size of the argument list."
 
const string Format_InvalidGuidFormatSpecification = "Format String can be only 'D', 'd', 'N', 'n', 'P', 'p', 'B', 'b', 'X' or 'x'."
 
const string Format_InvalidString = "Input string was not in a correct format."
 
const string Format_NeedSingleChar = "String must be exactly one character long."
 
const string Format_NoParsibleDigits = "Could not find any recognizable digits."
 
const string Format_BadTimeSpan = "String was not recognized as a valid TimeSpan."

const string InvalidOperation_HandleIsNotInitialized = "Handle is not initialized."
 
const string InvalidOperation_IComparerFailed = "Failed to compare two elements in the array."
 
const string InvalidOperation_NoValue = "Nullable object must have a value."
 
const string InvalidOperation_NullArray = "The underlying array is null."
 
const string InvalidOperation_Overlapped_Pack = "Cannot pack a packed Overlapped again."
 
const string InvalidOperation_ReadOnly = "Instance is read-only."

const string InvalidOperation_UnknownEnumType = "Unknown enum type."
 
const string InvalidOperation_WriteOnce = "This property has already been set and cannot be modified."
 
const string InvalidOperation_ArrayCreateInstance_NotARuntimeType = "Array.CreateInstance() can only accept Type objects created by the runtime."

const string InvalidOperation_NullContext = "Cannot call Set on a null context"

const string InvalidOperation_CannotUseAFCMultiple = "AsyncFlowControl object can be used only once to call Undo()."

const string InvalidProgram_Specific = "Common Language Runtime detected an invalid program. The body of method '{0}' is invalid."

const string InvalidProgram_NativeCallable = "NativeCallable method cannot be called from managed code."

const string InvalidTimeZone_NoTTInfoStructures = "There are no ttinfo structures in the tzfile. At least one ttinfo structure is required in order to construct a TimeZoneInfo object."
 
const string InvalidTimeZone_UnparseablePosixMDateString = "'{0}' is not a valid POSIX-TZ-environment-variable MDate rule. A valid rule has the format 'Mm.w.d'."

const string IO_FileLoad_FileName = "Could not load the file '{0}'."

const string Lazy_ctor_ModeInvalid = "The mode argument specifies an invalid value."
 
const string Lazy_StaticInit_InvalidOperation = "ValueFactory returned null."
 
const string Lazy_ToString_ValueNotCreated = "Value is not created."
 
const string Lazy_Value_RecursiveCallsToValue = "ValueFactory attempted to access the Value property of this instance."
 
const string MissingConstructor_Name = "Constructor on type '{0}' not found."
 
const string MustUseCCRewrite = "An assembly (probably '{1}') must be rewritten using the code contracts binary rewriter (CCRewrite) because it is calling Contract.{0} and the CONTRACTS_FULL symbol is defined. Remove any explicit definitions of the CONTRACTS_FULL symbol from your project and rebuild. CCRewrite can be downloaded from http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=169180. \\r\\nAfter the rewriter is installed, it can be enabled in Visual Studio from the project's Properties page on the Code Contracts pane. Ensure that 'Perform Runtime Contract Checking' is enabled, which will define CONTRACTS_FULL."
 
const string NotSupported_MaxWaitHandles = "The number of WaitHandles must be less than or equal to 64."
 
const string NotSupported_NoCodepageData = "No data is available for encoding {0}. For information on defining a custom encoding, see the documentation for the Encoding.RegisterProvider method."
 
const string NotSupported_StringComparison = "The string comparison type passed in is currently not supported."
 
const string NotSupported_VoidArray = "Arrays of System.Void are not supported."
 
const string NotSupported_ByRefLike = "Cannot create boxed ByRef-like values."
 
const string NotSupported_Type = "Type is not supported."
 
const string NotSupported_WaitAllSTAThread = "WaitAll for multiple handles on a STA thread is not supported."
 
const string ObjectDisposed_ObjectName_Name = "Object name: '{0}'."

const string Overflow_Char = "Value was either too large or too small for a character."
 
const string Overflow_Double = "Value was either too large or too small for a Double."
 
const string Overflow_TimeSpanElementTooLarge = "The TimeSpan could not be parsed because at least one of the numeric components is out of range or contains too many digits."
 
const string Overflow_Duration = "The duration cannot be returned for TimeSpan.MinValue because the absolute value of TimeSpan.MinValue exceeds the value of TimeSpan.MaxValue."
 
const string Overflow_Int16 = "Value was either too large or too small for an Int16."
 
const string Overflow_NegateTwosCompNum = "Negating the minimum value of a twos complement number is invalid."
 
const string Overflow_NegativeUnsigned = "The string was being parsed as an unsigned number and could not have a negative sign."
 
const string Overflow_SByte = "Value was either too large or too small for a signed byte."

const string Overflow_TimeSpanTooLong = "TimeSpan overflowed because the duration is too long."
 
const string Overflow_UInt16 = "Value was either too large or too small for a UInt16."

const string Format_BadDatePattern = "Could not determine the order of year, month, and date from '{0}'."
 
const string Format_BadDateTime = "String '{0}' was not recognized as a valid DateTime."
 
const string Format_BadDateTimeCalendar = "The DateTime represented by the string '{0}' is not supported in calendar '{1}'."
 
const string Format_BadDayOfWeek = "String '{0}' was not recognized as a valid DateTime because the day of week was incorrect."
 
const string Format_DateOutOfRange = "The DateTime represented by the string '{0}' is out of range."
 
const string Format_MissingIncompleteDate = "There must be at least a partial date with a year present in the input string '{0}'."
 
const string Format_OffsetOutOfRange = "The time zone offset of string '{0}' must be within plus or minus 14 hours."
 
const string Format_RepeatDateTimePattern = "DateTime pattern '{0}' appears more than once with different values."
 
const string Format_UnknownDateTimeWord = "The string '{0}' was not recognized as a valid DateTime. There is an unknown word starting at index '{1}'."
 
const string Format_UTCOutOfRange = "The UTC representation of the date '{0}' falls outside the year range 1-9999."
 
const string RFLCT_Ambiguous = "Ambiguous match found."
 
const string AggregateException_ctor_DefaultMessage = "One or more errors occurred."
 
const string AggregateException_ctor_InnerExceptionNull = "An element of innerExceptions was null."
 
const string AggregateException_DeserializationFailure = "The serialization stream contains no inner exceptions."
 
const string AggregateException_InnerException = "(Inner Exception #{0}) "
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_TimeoutTooLarge = "Time-out interval must be less than 2^32-2."
 
const string ArgumentOutOfRange_PeriodTooLarge = "Period must be less than 2^32-2."
 
const string TaskScheduler_FromCurrentSynchronizationContext_NoCurrent = "The current SynchronizationContext may not be used as a TaskScheduler."
 
const string TaskScheduler_ExecuteTask_WrongTaskScheduler = "ExecuteTask may not be called for a task which was previously queued to a different TaskScheduler."
 
const string TaskScheduler_InconsistentStateAfterTryExecuteTaskInline = "The TryExecuteTaskInline call to the underlying scheduler succeeded, but the task body was not invoked."
 
const string TaskSchedulerException_ctor_DefaultMessage = "An exception was thrown by a TaskScheduler."
 
const string Task_MultiTaskContinuation_FireOptions = "It is invalid to exclude specific continuation kinds for continuations off of multiple tasks."
 
const string Task_ContinueWith_ESandLR = "The specified TaskContinuationOptions combined LongRunning and ExecuteSynchronously. Synchronous continuations should not be long running."
 
const string Task_MultiTaskContinuation_EmptyTaskList = "The tasks argument contains no tasks."
 
const string Task_MultiTaskContinuation_NullTask = "The tasks argument included a null value."
 
const string Task_FromAsync_PreferFairness = "It is invalid to specify TaskCreationOptions.PreferFairness in calls to FromAsync."
 
const string Task_FromAsync_LongRunning = "It is invalid to specify TaskCreationOptions.LongRunning in calls to FromAsync."
 
const string AsyncMethodBuilder_InstanceNotInitialized = "The builder was not properly initialized."
 
const string TaskT_TransitionToFinal_AlreadyCompleted = "An attempt was made to transition a task to a final state when it had already completed."
 
const string TaskT_DebuggerNoResult = "{Not yet computed}"
 
const string OperationCanceled = "The operation was canceled."
 
const string CancellationToken_CreateLinkedToken_TokensIsEmpty = "No tokens were supplied."
 
const string CancellationTokenSource_Disposed = "The CancellationTokenSource has been disposed."
 
const string CancellationToken_SourceDisposed = "The CancellationTokenSource associated with this CancellationToken has been disposed."
 
const string TaskExceptionHolder_UnknownExceptionType = "(Internal)Expected an Exception or an IEnumerable<Exception>"
 
const string TaskExceptionHolder_UnhandledException = "A Task's exception(s) were not observed either by Waiting on the Task or accessing its Exception property. As a result, the unobserved exception was rethrown by the finalizer thread."
 
const string Task_Delay_InvalidMillisecondsDelay = "The value needs to be either -1 (signifying an infinite timeout), 0 or a positive integer."
 
const string Task_Delay_InvalidDelay = "The value needs to translate in milliseconds to -1 (signifying an infinite timeout), 0 or a positive integer less than or equal to Int32.MaxValue."
 
const string Task_Dispose_NotCompleted = "A task may only be disposed if it is in a completion state (RanToCompletion, Faulted or Canceled)."
 
const string Task_WaitMulti_NullTask = "The tasks array included at least one null element."
 
const string Task_ContinueWith_NotOnAnything = "The specified TaskContinuationOptions excluded all continuation kinds."
 
const string Task_RunSynchronously_AlreadyStarted = "RunSynchronously may not be called on a task that was already started."
 
const string Task_ThrowIfDisposed = "The task has been disposed."
 
const string Task_RunSynchronously_TaskCompleted = "RunSynchronously may not be called on a task that has already completed."
 
const string Task_RunSynchronously_Promise = "RunSynchronously may not be called on a task not bound to a delegate, such as the task returned from an asynchronous method."
 
const string Task_RunSynchronously_Continuation = "RunSynchronously may not be called on a continuation task."
 
const string Task_Start_AlreadyStarted = "Start may not be called on a task that was already started."
 
const string Task_Start_ContinuationTask = "Start may not be called on a continuation task."
 
const string Task_Start_Promise = "Start may not be called on a promise-style task."
 
const string Task_Start_TaskCompleted = "Start may not be called on a task that has completed."
 
const string TaskCanceledException_ctor_DefaultMessage = "A task was canceled."
 
const string TaskCompletionSourceT_TrySetException_NoExceptions = "The exceptions collection was empty."
 
const string TaskCompletionSourceT_TrySetException_NullException = "The exceptions collection included at least one null element."
 
const string Argument_MinMaxValue = "'{0}' cannot be greater than {1}."
 
const string ExecutionContext_ExceptionInAsyncLocalNotification = "An exception was not handled in an AsyncLocal<T> notification callback."
 
const string InvalidOperation_WrongAsyncResultOrEndCalledMultiple = "Either the IAsyncResult object did not come from the corresponding async method on this type, or the End method was called multiple times with the same IAsyncResult."
 
const string SpinLock_IsHeldByCurrentThread = "Thread tracking is disabled."
 
const string SpinLock_TryEnter_LockRecursionException = "The calling thread already holds the lock."
 
const string SpinLock_Exit_SynchronizationLockException = "The calling thread does not hold the lock."
 
const string SpinLock_TryReliableEnter_ArgumentException = "The tookLock argument must be set to false before calling this method."
 
const string SpinLock_TryEnter_ArgumentOutOfRange = "The timeout must be a value between -1 and Int32.MaxValue, inclusive."
 
const string ManualResetEventSlim_Disposed = "The event has been disposed."
 
const string ManualResetEventSlim_ctor_SpinCountOutOfRange = "The spinCount argument must be in the range 0 to {0}, inclusive."
 
const string ManualResetEventSlim_ctor_TooManyWaiters = "There are too many threads currently waiting on the event. A maximum of {0} waiting threads are supported."
 
const string InvalidOperation_SendNotSupportedOnWindowsRTSynchronizationContext = "Send is not supported in the Windows Runtime SynchronizationContext"
 
const string SemaphoreSlim_Disposed = "The semaphore has been disposed."
 
const string SemaphoreSlim_Release_CountWrong = "The releaseCount argument must be greater than zero."
 
const string SemaphoreSlim_Wait_TimeoutWrong = "The timeout must represent a value between -1 and Int32.MaxValue, inclusive."
 
const string SemaphoreSlim_ctor_MaxCountWrong = "The maximumCount argument must be a positive number. If a maximum is not required, use the constructor without a maxCount parameter."
 
const string SemaphoreSlim_ctor_InitialCountWrong = "The initialCount argument must be non-negative and less than or equal to the maximumCount."
 
const string ThreadLocal_ValuesNotAvailable = "The ThreadLocal object is not tracking values. To use the Values property, use a ThreadLocal constructor that accepts the trackAllValues parameter and set the parameter to true."
 
const string ThreadLocal_Value_RecursiveCallsToValue = "ValueFactory attempted to access the Value property of this instance."
 
const string ThreadLocal_Disposed = "The ThreadLocal object has been disposed."
 
const string LockRecursionException_WriteAfterReadNotAllowed = "Write lock may not be acquired with read lock held. This pattern is prone to deadlocks. Please ensure that read locks are released before taking a write lock. If an upgrade is necessary, use an upgrade lock in place of the read lock."
 
const string LockRecursionException_RecursiveWriteNotAllowed = "Recursive write lock acquisitions not allowed in this mode."
 
const string LockRecursionException_ReadAfterWriteNotAllowed = "A read lock may not be acquired with the write lock held in this mode."
 
const string LockRecursionException_RecursiveUpgradeNotAllowed = "Recursive upgradeable lock acquisitions not allowed in this mode."
 
const string LockRecursionException_RecursiveReadNotAllowed = "Recursive read lock acquisitions not allowed in this mode."
 
const string SynchronizationLockException_IncorrectDispose = "The lock is being disposed while still being used. It either is being held by a thread and/or has active waiters waiting to acquire the lock."
 
const string SynchronizationLockException_MisMatchedWrite = "The write lock is being released without being held."
 
const string LockRecursionException_UpgradeAfterReadNotAllowed = "Upgradeable lock may not be acquired with read lock held."
 
const string LockRecursionException_UpgradeAfterWriteNotAllowed = "Upgradeable lock may not be acquired with write lock held in this mode. Acquiring Upgradeable lock gives the ability to read along with an option to upgrade to a writer."
 
const string SynchronizationLockException_MisMatchedUpgrade = "The upgradeable lock is being released without being held."
 
const string SynchronizationLockException_MisMatchedRead = "The read lock is being released without being held."
 
const string InvalidOperation_TimeoutsNotSupported = "Timeouts are not supported on this stream."
 
const string NotSupported_SubclassOverride = "Derived classes must provide an implementation."
 
const string InvalidOperation_NoPublicRemoveMethod = "Cannot remove the event handler since no public remove method exists for the event."
 
const string InvalidOperation_NoPublicAddMethod = "Cannot add the event handler since no public add method exists for the event."
 
const string SerializationException = "Serialization error."

const string Serialization_OptionalFieldVersionValue = "Version value must be positive."
 
const string Serialization_SameNameTwice = "Cannot add the same member twice to a SerializationInfo object."
 
const string NotSupported_AbstractNonCLS = "This non-CLS method is not implemented."
 
const string NotSupported_NoTypeInfo = "Cannot resolve {0} to a TypeInfo object."

const string Argument_InvalidMemberForNamedArgument = "The member must be either a field or a property."

const string Arg_MustBePointer = "Type must be a Pointer."

const string InvalidFilterCriteriaException_CritString = "A String must be provided for the filter criteria."

const string Format_StringZeroLength = "String cannot have zero length."

const string Security_RegistryPermission = "Requested registry access is not allowed."

const string ClassLoad_ValueClassTooLarge = "Array of type '{0}' from assembly '{1}' cannot be created because base value type is too large."

const string Arg_TypeUnloadedException = "Type had been unloaded."

const string EventSource_EvenHexDigits = "Must have an even number of Hexidecimal digits."
 
const string EventSource_EventChannelOutOfRange = "Channel {0} has a value of {1} which is outside the legal range (16-254)."
 
const string EventSource_EventIdReused = "Event {0} has ID {1} which is already in use."
 
const string EventSource_EventMustHaveTaskIfNonDefaultOpcode = "Event {0} (with ID {1}) has a non-default opcode but not a task."
 
const string EventSource_EventMustNotBeExplicitImplementation = "Event method {0} (with ID {1}) is an explicit interface method implementation. Re-write method as implicit implementation."
 
const string EventSource_EventNameDoesNotEqualTaskPlusOpcode = "Event {0} (with ID {1}) has a name that is not the concatenation of its task name and opcode."
 
const string EventSource_EventNameReused = "Event name {0} used more than once. If you wish to overload a method, the overloaded method should have a NonEvent attribute."
 
const string EventSource_EventParametersMismatch = "Event {0} was called with {1} argument(s), but it is defined with {2} parameter(s)."
 
const string EventSource_EventSourceGuidInUse = "An instance of EventSource with Guid {0} already exists."
 
const string EventSource_EventTooBig = "The payload for a single event is too large."
 
const string EventSource_EventWithAdminChannelMustHaveMessage = "Event {0} specifies an Admin channel {1}. It must specify a Message property."

const string Cryptography_ECXmlSerializationFormatRequired = "XML serialization of an elliptic curve key requires using an overload which specifies the XML format to be used."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidCurveOid = "The specified Oid is not valid. The Oid.FriendlyName or Oid.Value property must be set."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidCurveKeyParameters = "The specified key parameters are not valid. Q.X and Q.Y are required fields. Q.X, Q.Y must be the same length. If D is specified it must be the same length as Q.X and Q.Y for named curves or the same length as Order for explicit curves."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidECCharacteristic2Curve = "The specified Characteristic2 curve parameters are not valid. Polynomial, A, B, G.X, G.Y, and Order are required. A, B, G.X, G.Y must be the same length, and the same length as Q.X, Q.Y and D if those are specified. Seed, Cofactor and Hash are optional. Other parameters are not allowed."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidECPrimeCurve = "The specified prime curve parameters are not valid. Prime, A, B, G.X, G.Y and Order are required and must be the same length, and the same length as Q.X, Q.Y and D if those are specified. Seed, Cofactor and Hash are optional. Other parameters are not allowed."
 
const string Cryptography_InvalidECNamedCurve = "The specified named curve parameters are not valid. Only the Oid parameter must be set."

const string InvalidOperation_ClaimCannotBeRemoved = "The Claim '{0}' was not able to be removed. It is either not part of this Identity or it is a Claim that is owned by the Principal that contains this Identity. For example, the Principal will own the Claim when creating a GenericPrincipal with roles. The roles will be exposed through the Identity that is passed in the constructor, but not actually owned by the Identity. Similar logic exists for a RolePrincipal."
